summary: Backend: 47/47 pytest PASS (22 pre-existing + 25 new covering user management, CSV export, manager role restrictions). Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): admin login OK, Profile→Manage Users navigation OK, Add User sheet creates manager, new user appears in list, Employee detail shows Share-PDF + Delete buttons for admin. Login as manager: Manage Users row correctly HIDDEN on Profile. TWO FRONTEND BUGS FOUND: (1) industries.tsx references `isAdmin` but never destructures it from useAuth() → ReferenceError red-screen on Industries tab for ALL users; (2) Employees tab `onExportCsv` is defined but NO export/download button is rendered in the header — only the + button exists.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: isAdmin is not defined at industries.tsx:121:10 (and also used at line 160). The component references `isAdmin` to gate the + button and per-row edit/delete icons, but never calls `useAuth()` or destructures `isAdmin`. Result: red-screen error on Industries tab whenever it renders. Manager flow was fully blocked by LogBox overlay. Fix: add `import { useAuth } from "../../src/auth";` and inside IndustriesScreen: `const { user } = useAuth(); const isAdmin = user?.role === "admin";`.

CSV export button is MISSING from the header JSX. The `onExportCsv` handler is defined (line 30) and `exporting` state exists, but only the `employees-add-btn` TouchableOpacity is rendered in the header (lines 73-82). The requested 'download icon button next to the + button' does not exist — no testID like `employees-export-btn` / `employees-download-btn` is present anywhere in the file (grep confirmed). Fix: render a second TouchableOpacity in the header with testID="employees-export-btn", an Ionicons cloud-download/download icon, and onPress={onExportCsv}.

react_native_issues.issue: Still emitting deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated → use boxShadow; props.pointerEvents deprecated → use style.pointerEvents. Cosmetic, carried over from iteration_2.

action_items: HIGH: Fix industries.tsx — import useAuth and declare `const isAdmin = user?.role === 'admin'` so the Industries tab stops red-screening. This unblocks both admin and manager flows on that tab.

HIGH: Add the missing CSV export button to app/(tabs)/employees.tsx header. The onExportCsv handler is already implemented; just render a TouchableOpacity with testID='employees-export-btn' and hook it up. Show an ActivityIndicator (or disabled state) while `exporting` is true.
Optional / LOW: Silence shadow*/pointerEvents deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend RBAC is clean: `require_admin` dependency used consistently on DELETE employees, industries POST/PUT/DELETE, and all /api/users routes. Verified via pytest — manager gets 403 on every admin-only route.
CSV export correctly uses StreamingResponse with text/csv content-type and Content-Disposition: attachment header; excludes _id and aadhaar_image_base64 from output (verified).
POST /api/users validates role in {admin, manager}; duplicate email → 409; DELETE self → 400; DELETE non-existent → 404. All verified.

Frontend code review: industries.tsx uses `isAdmin` without defining it — TypeScript compiler likely did not catch this because the file is .tsx with implicit any on an undefined identifier at runtime. Recommend enabling stricter ESLint no-undef rule.
Frontend code review: employees.tsx has unused state `exporting` because the export button was never added — indicates a partial implementation that was not wired to UI.
seed_data_creation: All test users (pw_mgr_*, pw_role_*) created during Playwright runs were cleaned up via DELETE /api/users. Pytest fixtures clean up their own TEST_* users, industries, and employees in teardown_class.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes the two HIGH bugs, re-run: (1) manager login → Industries tab (should render with no + and no edit/delete icons, no red screen), (2) admin login → Employees tab (should see download/export icon next to + and clicking it should produce a CSV download on web). Backend is fully green; no need to re-run backend unless RBAC logic changes. Use manager credentials by pre-creating via POST /api/users; do NOT lock out admin account — brute force test uses random emails. There are a few lingering TEST_/UI_TEST_ industries from prior iterations — safe to ignore.
rca_of_issue:
industries.tsx red-screen RCA: The JSX references `isAdmin` as a free identifier inside IndustriesScreen(), but the component never calls useAuth() nor imports anything providing `isAdmin`. At runtime, this hits the TDZ/undefined check and React throws ReferenceError which the error boundary catches and renders LogBox red-screen on web. Reproduction: open /industries as any logged-in user → immediate red-screen. Fix in <=3 lines: `import { useAuth } from '../../src/auth';` + `const { user } = useAuth();` + `const isAdmin = user?.role === 'admin';` inside IndustriesScreen.

Employees export-button missing RCA: The handler `onExportCsv` and its `exporting` state exist (lines 28-40) but no TouchableOpacity in the returned JSX calls it. The header at lines 73-82 renders only the + button. Fix: inside the header View, add a second TouchableOpacity with testID='employees-export-btn' wrapping an Ionicons download/cloud-download icon with onPress={onExportCsv} and disabled={exporting}.
